dts.title: DVSA Test Wait Times Just Updated — What Learners Need to Know Right Now
dts.hook: React on camera to the latest DVSA area wait-time data, call out the worst-affected centres, and segue into how test-date swapping gets you a slot weeks earlier.

dts.title: Is Swapping Your Driving Test Date Legal? The Truth (No, It's Not a Scam)
dts.hook: Bust the top myth stopping learners from using DTS — answer the 'is it allowed?' objection head-on with a DVSA policy reference, then show how the platform works in under 60 seconds.

athletics.title: First Sprint Session of the Week — Track POV
athletics.hook: Film warmup drills, 3-4 sprint reps, and a short post-session reaction talking splits and feel — raw no-edit style performs well for athlete personal brands.

athletics.title: 3 Calisthenics Moves That Directly Improve Sprint Explosiveness
athletics.format: Gym clip — Instagram Reel / YouTube Short
athletics.hook: Demo explosive push-ups, jump squats, and L-sit to tuck jumps; voice-over links each move to first-step acceleration — bridges calisthenics audience to sprint content.

aimybiz.title: I Showed a Sales Manager CloseCoach — Here Is What Happened
aimybiz.format: LinkedIn post with short demo video or screenshot carousel
aimybiz.hook: Walk through a 60-second AI roleplay session inside CloseCoach, show the live objection feedback, and end with the manager's reaction — social proof drives demo requests.

aimybiz.title: Your Sales Team Is Losing Deals Because of This One Mistake (AI Coaching Fixes It)
aimybiz.hook: Open with a stat on deliberate practice in sales, name the mistake (skipping objection rehearsal), and close with a soft pitch for a free CloseCoach trial.
